response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with ~18 years of broad experience, but the role requires deep, current C++/STL expertise for industrial automation. His only professional C++ work was a 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015; his systems-level strengths are in DLang and Node.js/TypeScript. There is no evidence of MQTT/IoT protocol work, message-broker architectures at industrial scale, Secure Development Lifecycle practice, or IEC 62443 familiarity, all of which are core to this position.
strengths: Genuine low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching at millions of requests/sec)
Long track record across embedded, desktop, web, and mobile with strong testing/TDD craftsmanship and mentoring
Event-driven architecture experience via his open-source geo-data platform and microservices work
concerns: C++/STL experience is minimal and roughly a decade old; recent work is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
No industrial automation, IoT/MQTT, or OT protocol exposure (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
No demonstrated SDL or IEC 62443 industrial-cybersecurity background required by the role

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity or SDL background
